notes: Arma 3 stock steel armor material. Engine coeff ~2.0x vs Default. Used in CfgVehicleHitPoints for most armored vehicle hulls. Maps to ~2x RHA in game armor calcs. Represents the game's abstract 'steel armor' class without specific metallurgical basis.

source.reference: ARMA 3 game engine configuration, BI config reference
source.methodology: RHAe=2.0 is the ARMA 3 game engine value for its 'steel' armor class, not derived from physical testing. Included for game compatibility.
